015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc.service;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.disposables.Disposable;
020import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.BehaviorProcessor;
021import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.FlowableProcessor;
022import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
023import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
024import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.TxOutSetInfo;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipPublisher;
026import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc.RxBitcoinClient;
027import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.DefaultRpcClient;
028import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.AsyncSupport;
029import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
030import org.slf4j.Logger;
031import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
032
033import java.io.Closeable;
034import java.io.IOError;
035import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
036import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
037import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicInteger;
038
039/**
040 * Service to return a stream of TxOutSetInfos for a given blockchain/client.
041 * Updates are triggered on new blocks (via {@link org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipService} a cache
042 * is used to prevent fetches of TxOutSetInfos already fetched (e.g. on blockchain re-org) and
043 * {@code MAX_OUTSTANDING_CALLS} is used to prevent overloading the server (e.g. during blockchain sync)
044 */
045public class TxOutSetService implements Closeable {
046    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(TxOutSetService.class);
047    private final RxBitcoinClient client;
048    private final ChainTipPublisher chainTipPublisher;
049    private final FlowableProcessor<TxOutSetInfo> txOutSetProcessor = BehaviorProcessor.create();
050    private final int CACHE_BLOCK_DEPTH = 1;
051    private final int MAX_OUTSTANDING_CALLS = 2;
052    private final AtomicInteger outstandingCalls = new AtomicInteger(0);
053    // TODO: Combine lastCall with cache and with in-memory SPV blockchain
054    private CompletableFuture<TxOutSetInfo> lastCall;
055    private final ConcurrentHashMap<Sha256Hash, TxOutSetInfo> txOutSetCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
056    private volatile Disposable txOutSetSubscription;
057
058    // TODO: Use BitcoinClient not RxBitcoinClient
059    /**
060     * @param client Client for requesting {@link TxOutSetInfo} objects.
061     * @param chainTipPublisher Publisher telling us when new blocks are available.
062     */
063    public TxOutSetService(RxBitcoinClient client, ChainTipPublisher chainTipPublisher) {
064        this.client = client;
065        this.chainTipPublisher = chainTipPublisher;
066    }
067
068    private synchronized void start() {
069        if (txOutSetSubscription == null) {
070            txOutSetSubscription = Flowable.fromPublisher(chainTipPublisher)
071                    .doOnNext(this::onNewBlock)
072                    .flatMap(this::fetchCacheMaybe)
073                    .subscribe(txOutSetProcessor::onNext, txOutSetProcessor::onError, txOutSetProcessor::onComplete);
074        }
075    }
076
077    public Publisher<TxOutSetInfo> getTxOutSetPublisher() {
078        start();
079        return txOutSetProcessor;
080    }
081    
082    private void onNewBlock(ChainTip tip) {
083        // Remove all cache entries with txOutSetInfo.height < tip.height - CACHE_BLOCK_DEPTH;
084        log.info("TxOutSetCache: checking {} entries for entries more than {} blocks old", txOutSetCache.size(), CACHE_BLOCK_DEPTH);
085        txOutSetCache.values().removeIf(txOutSetInfo -> {
086            boolean remove = txOutSetInfo.getHeight() < (tip.getHeight() - CACHE_BLOCK_DEPTH);
087            if (remove) {
088                log.info("Removing TxOutSetInfo For {}/{}", txOutSetInfo.getHeight(), txOutSetInfo.getBestBlock());
089            }
090            return remove;
091        });
092    }
093
094    // TODO: Ignoring all IOError is too broad
095    final DefaultRpcClient.TransientErrorFilter errorFilter = AsyncSupport.TransientErrorFilter.of(
096            (t) -> t instanceof IOError,                        // Ignore if IOError
097            (t) -> log.warn("Ignoring transient error: ", t)    // Log if ignored
098    );
099
100    // TODO: Convert to using CompletableFuture to drop dependency on RxBitcoinClient and RxJava
101    /**
102     * Try to fetch a TxOutSetInfo from the cache or from the network. Returning an empty stream if a transient error occurs.
103     * To use this you will typically call {@link Flowable#flatMap(io.reactivex.rxjava3.functions.Function)}.
104     * @param tip ChainTip we are looking for
105     * @return An Observable that returns 0 or 1 (behaves as a Maybe) TxOutSetInfo
106     */
107    private Publisher<TxOutSetInfo> fetchCacheMaybe(ChainTip tip) {
108        return client.pollOnceAsPublisher(() -> fetchCache(tip), errorFilter);
109    }
110
111    // Try to fetch a TxOutSetInfo from the cache or from the network.
112    private CompletableFuture<TxOutSetInfo> fetchCache(ChainTip tip) {
113        TxOutSetInfo cached = txOutSetCache.get(tip.getHash());
114        if (cached != null) {
115            return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(cached);
116        } else {
117            return fetch(tip);
118        }
119    }
120
121    // Fetch a TxOutSetInfo or return last one if too many calls are outstanding
122    private CompletableFuture<TxOutSetInfo> fetch(ChainTip tip) {
123        if (outstandingCalls.intValue() >= MAX_OUTSTANDING_CALLS) {
124            // TODO: Use a synthesized totalCoins (e.g. lastValue + block_reward * delta_blocks)
125            log.info("Re-using last call because {} outstanding calls. ", MAX_OUTSTANDING_CALLS);
126        } else {
127            int calls = outstandingCalls.incrementAndGet();
128            log.info("Fetching TxOutSetInfo For {}/{} ({} outstanding calls)", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash(), calls);
129            lastCall = client.supplyAsync(client::getTxOutSetInfo)
130                    .whenComplete(this::fetchCompletion);
131        }
132        return lastCall;
133    }
134
135    private void fetchCompletion(TxOutSetInfo info, Throwable t) {
136        int calls = outstandingCalls.decrementAndGet();
137        if (info != null) {
138            log.info("Completion result for: {}/{} ({} outstanding calls)", info.getHeight(), info.getBestBlock(), calls);
139            txOutSetCache.put(info.getBestBlock(), info);
140        } else {
141            log.info("Completion throwable: {} ({} outstanding calls)", t, calls);
142        }
143    }
144    
145    @Override
146    public void close()  {
147        if (txOutSetSubscription != null) {
148            txOutSetSubscription.dispose();
149        }
150    }
151}
